creator: dmgk@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #0)

aletheia-icu:broccoli:c5ac961a357a:group_name/vendor/aletheia.icu/broccoli/fs

should be

aletheia-icu:broccoli:c5ac961a357a:aletheia_icu/vendor/aletheia.icu/broccoli

It builds fine for me after this correction. modules2tuple couldn't figure out the `/fs` suffix because it couldn't find the Github mirror (vcs.aletheia.icu doesn't report it in html meta tags). I'll add this mirror to the static list in the next version.
